apps.name: ByeTunes
apps.subtitle: Say goodbye to iTunes sync!
apps.localizedDescription: ByeTunes is a native iOS app that lets you inject music (MP3, M4A, FLAC, WAV) and ringtones directly into your device's media library—without needing a computer connection for every sync. It communicates directly with the iOS media database, giving you the power to manage your music on your terms.
